PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?winner ?label WHERE {
  wd:Q4597667 wdt:P1346 ?winner .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
}
